title: baphorhiza tinctoria
intro: Baphorhiza tinctoria, also known as the "dye plant", is a species of flowering plant in the family Rubiaceae. It is used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Baphorhiza tinctoria include reducing fever, relieving pain, and treating various skin conditions such as wounds and eczema. In herbal preparations, the plant's leaves and stems are typically dried and used to make teas, infusions, or tinctures for therapeutic purposes.
